flags.name: -load <float>
flags.description:
sets load value, no float sets current
default: 0

flags.name: -arc <float>
flags.description:
non zero sets to arc drawing mode
default: 1

flags.name: -bgcolor <list>
flags.description:
sets background color in hexdecimal or RGB list
default: #dfdfdf

flags.name: -fgcolor <list>
flags.description:
sets foreground color in hexdecimal or RGB list
default: #000000

flags.name: -circular <float>
flags.description:
non zero sets to circular dragging mode
default: 0

flags.name: -angle <float>
flags.description:
sets angular range value in degrees
default: 320

flags.name: -offset <float>
flags.description:
sets angular offset in degrees
default: 0

flags.name: -discrete <float>
flags.description:
non zero sets to discrete mode
default: 0

flags.name: -jump <float>
flags.description:
non zero sets to jump on click mode
default: 0

methods.description: sets value (no output)

sets size in pixels
sets arc start value, no float sets current

non zero sets to square drawing mode

sets receive symbol
